title: Best Project Management for Agencies 2026
description: Find the best project management software for agencies in 2026. Expert recommendations, pricing comparison, and buying guide for agencies teams.
useCaseDescription: Agencies teams face unique challenges when selecting project management software. Budget constraints, scalability requirements, and specific workflow needs all factor into the decision. This guide evaluates the top project management platforms specifically for agencies use cases.

selectionCriteria.description: Quick onboarding for agencies team members
Ability to grow with agencies needs
Responsive customer support for agencies teams

commonPitfalls: Choosing a platform that is too expensive for agencies budgets
Overlooking integration requirements with existing tools
Not testing the platform with real agencies workflows

faqs.question: What is the best project management software for agencies?
faqs.answer: Based on our evaluation, the recommended project management platforms for agencies include Airtable, Asana, ClickUp, Confluence. Each offers different strengths for agencies requirements.

faqs.question: How much should agencies teams spend on project management software?
faqs.answer: agencies teams typically spend $10-200 per user per month on project management software, depending on feature requirements and team size.

faqs.question: What features matter most for agencies?
faqs.answer: Key features for agencies teams include core project management functionality, integration capabilities, mobile access, and scalable pricing.
